subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and the upheavals in Mashhad and throughout Khurasan became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و انقلابات مشهد و اطراف خراسان معلوم گردید و
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @predictions and prophecies, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @relationship between government and people, @parliaments; constitutional government
